intel.title: News Radar
intel.subtitle: Multi-source news hub: AI helps you cross-reference and extract key points

tabs.eventsDesc: Global macro expectation probabilities (public data, read-only), coming soon
tabs.filingsDesc: Aggregated recent filings for watchlist stocks (East Money public disclosures)
tabs.newsDesc: Aggregated recent news for watchlist stocks (public sources)
tabs.investmentNewsDesc: 12-track global public RSS news (integrated from investment-news repo)

intel.noNewsYet: No news fetched yet. Click Refresh above to pull (about 20-40 seconds).
intel.aiReading: AI is reading this track's news…
intel.needKey: AI not connected yet. <Link to settings>Connect your AI first</Link> to extract today's highlights for this track.
intel.noRecentUpdates: No updates in this track for the last {{days}} days
intel.watchlistEmpty: No watched stocks yet. Go to <Link>Daily Review</Link> to add stocks (6-digit codes). Filings / news for them will appear here.
intel.needPlugin: Plugin not installed. Install it to enable news.
intel.disclaimer: Only aggregates public information, no recommendations, no predictions. Filings / news come from public disclosures and public sources of stocks in your watchlist; track news is filtered by compliance vocabulary. Today's highlights are extracted by your own configured AI.
intel.dataSourceComingSoon: This data source is under development — you can use 'Investment News' to see 12-track public news, or use 'A-Share Filings / Public News' to see watchlist stock updates.

stock.title: Stock Data
stock.subtitle: Quotes · Valuation · Reports · News — all objective data, let your AI make the judgment

local: What are the key disagreements in recent reports?

globalStock.dataNote: Data from global-stock-data (East Money) · Amounts in native currency · Objective data only, no buy/sell advice

earningsSnapshot.title: Earnings Snapshot
earningsSnapshot.subtitle: Latest earnings + forward consensus + valuation position at a glance. Objective mechanical classification, not buy/sell advice.

valuationPercentile.title: Valuation Historical Percentile
valuationPercentile.subtitle: Green = Undervalued / Gray = Fair / Red = Overvalued. Shows current historical position only, not buy/sell advice.

financials.title: Key Financials
financials.subtitle: Tonghuashun financial summary, latest reporting period.

news.title: Stock News
news.needPlugin: Plugin not installed. Install it to enable news/announcements.

fundChips.title: Fund Flow · Chips
fundChips.note: Fund/chip data is public objective data for understanding the stock's current state only, not investment advice.

dragonTiger.title: Dragon & Tiger List ({{count}} times in 30 days)

stock.emptyHint:
Enter a 6-digit stock code to pull its quotes, valuation, reports, and news.
Data from public sources (Tencent Quotes / East Money Reports / akshare); Vibe-Research does not pre-load any stocks or make recommendations.

portfolio.title: My Portfolio
portfolio.subtitle: Self-entered, stored locally, real-time floating P&L

suggestions.concentration: Which sectors is my portfolio concentrated in?

portfolio.securityNote: Portfolio is stored locally only, not uploaded, not in any repo. Prices auto-refresh every 30 minutes. This product provides no stocks, no advice — it only helps you track your own positions.

addHolding.title: Add Position
addHolding.sameCodeHint: Adding the same code again merges via weighted average cost (averaging up).

errors.invalidShares: Shares must be > 0, cost must be a number (can be negative)

detail.emptyHint: No holdings yet. Use the form above to add one.
detail.name: Name

errors.invalidCode: Closed position: Please enter a 6-digit code
errors.invalidValues: Close price / shares must be > 0, cost must be a number (can be negative)
errors.addFailed: Failed to add closed position record

closed.title: Closed Positions
closed.emptyHint: No closed position records yet. After selling, add a record above as realized P&L history.

watchlist.title: Watchlist
watchlist.subtitle: Batch add and overview all your tracked stocks. Data stored locally only.

suggestions.valuation: Which of these have high valuations?
suggestions.group: Help me group them by sector
suggestions.risks: What's the biggest risk for each?

watchlist.addHint: Batch add — paste a list of codes (comma / space / newline, auto-detects 6-digit A-share codes)
watchlist.noNewCode: No new 6-digit codes recognized (may already be in watchlist)

overview.title: Watchlist Overview
overview.emptyHint: No watchlist stocks yet. Paste a list of codes in the box above to batch add.
overview.name: Name

settings.title: Connect AI
settings.subtitle: Configure once, use your own model for all 'Ask AI' and 'Review' features site-wide
settings.securityNote: API key is stored in your local browser only. It is sent to your own backend to call the model when you ask a question. Never uploaded, never in any repo. All analysis is provided by your model — this product does not calibrate.

subscription.title: Subscription Access
subscription.desc: Calls your locally installed AI CLI (Claude Code / Qwen / DeepSeek / Codex…) using your subscription quota, no API key needed. Backend must be running locally.
subscription.description: Select a locally installed and logged-in CLI. Vibe-Research backend uses it with your subscription quota — no key needed.
subscription.note: (Only works when backend runs locally; for reviews / today's highlights / stock AI queries, etc.)

api.title: API Access
api.desc: Paste your API key. Supports DeepSeek / Doubao / MiniMax / OpenAI / OpenRouter / any compatible endpoint. Ready to use.
api.modelPlaceholder: Model name (Doubao: use ep-… endpoint ID)
api.errorFillAll: Please fill in Base URL, API Key, and Model

toasts.savedApi: Saved locally. 'Ask AI / Review' is now available site-wide
toasts.savedSubscription: Selected '{{name}}' subscription. 'Ask AI / Review' will use your local {{name}}
toasts.selectAvailable: Please select an available subscription (marked 'Coming soon' are not yet supported)

accessKey.title: Backend Access Key (Optional)
accessKey.desc: Only needed when the backend has VR_API_KEY set (for public deployment anti-abuse). Fill in the same value as the backend. If running locally without auth, leave empty. Also stored locally only.

reports.title: My Reports
reports.subtitle: Drag in your research reports to archive. Auto-categorized by industry. Files stored in local deploy directory only — not uploaded, not in any repo.
reports.uploadHint: Drag reports here, or click to select files
reports.supportedFormats: Supports PDF / Word / txt / md / spreadsheets / images, max 25MB each, multiple selection allowed
reports.emptyHint: No archived reports yet. Drag your collected reports into the box above — they'll be auto-categorized by industry.
reports.deleteConfirm: Delete '{{name}}'? (Also removed from local archive directory)

notes.title: Research Notes
notes.subtitle: AI reviews / highlights / Q&A saved locally for anytime review. Data stored locally only.
notes.emptyHint: No notes yet. Click 'Save to Archive' in Daily Review, News Radar, or Ask AI to save analysis results.

sectors.title: Sector Center
sectors.subtitle: {{count}} hot sector value chain frameworks · Only segments, no stocks
sectors.totalHint: {{total}} sectors, {{hotCount}} hot · Segments verified and completed in real-time

sectorDetail.aiLabel: Let AI break down this sector

suggestions.valueChain: Value chain map of this sector

sectorDetail.addWatchHint: Want to track stocks for a specific segment? Data stored locally — not uploaded, not in any repo.
sectorDetail.underVerificationDetail: This sector's segment framework is being verified in real-time (not relying on model memory) — verified sectors are shown on the left.
sectorDetail.useAiHint: You can also click 'Let AI break down this sector' in the top right to have your own AI map out the value chain using the 7-dimension framework.

askAi.label: Ask AI
askAi.title: Ask AI · Page Context
askAi.contextHint: Page context that will be sent to AI with your question:
askAi.disclaimer: Analysis conclusions are provided by your own configured AI. This product only packages the page data as context and lets AI call data tools. No calibration, no endorsement, no responsibility for results.
askAi.aiDisclaimer: AI can answer based on this page's context and by calling A-share quote/valuation/report data on its own. Conclusions are from your model, not investment advice.

disclaimer.full: Vibe-Research is a neutral information aggregation and AI integration tool. Rankings (consecutive limit-ups / turnover, etc.) are all objective public data; this product only presents facts — no stock picks, no predictions, no buy/sell timing, no investment advice. All analysis directions within the dashboard are provided by your own configured AI and are not affiliated with this product. Please verify independently and make your own decisions. Invest at your own risk.
disclaimer.compact: Vibe-Research only presents objective public data and rankings. No stock picks, no predictions, not investment advice.

errors.networkError: Cannot connect to backend. Please start the backend first (uvicorn app:app --port 8900)
errors.authRequired: Backend auth enabled (VR_API_KEY): Please fill in the backend access key at the bottom of the Connect AI page
errors.aiNotConfigured: AI not connected yet. Please configure in 'Connect AI' first
